title: TagResourceRequest
description: TagResourceRequest schema from Amazon GameLift API

allOf.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that uniquely identifies the Amazon GameLift resource that you want to assign tags to. Amazon GameLift includes resource ARNs in the data object for the resource. You can retrieve the ARN by calling a List or Describe operation for the resource type.

A list of one or more tags to assign to the specified Amazon GameLift resource. Tags are developer-defined and structured as key-value pairs. The maximum tag limit may be lower than stated. See Tagging Amazon Web Services Resources for tagging limits.
